_comment: Candidate-improvements queue for the salary model. One entry per idea, each with a testable acceptance criterion so the evaluator (or a human) can tell whether it actually worked. Derived from MODEL_ISSUES_AND_FIXES.md pending items. Status: queued | in_progress | shipped | rejected. Do not delete rejected entries; they are the loop's memory of dead ends.

candidates.title: Predict [log(min), log(max)] band instead of midpoint once DB has enough band rows
candidates.blocked_on: DB needs ~1500 band-bearing rows (est. 3-4 weeks of scraping, or expand keyword/city pool)
candidates.acceptance: Band heads hold min R2 >= 0.47 and max R2 >= 0.57 on held-out band rows; midpoint model R2 does not regress below contract floor.

candidates.title: Add more disclosed-salary sources (Naukri-style Kaggle dumps) over scaling quantized Adzuna
candidates.source: MODEL_ISSUES takeaway: real bands beat feature engineering here
candidates.blocked_on: license-clean dataset with real bands + experience
candidates.acceptance: kaggle/real-source per-source R2 >= 0.50 and overall R2 improves vs current shipped run, with no per-source slice above the leakage ceiling.

candidates.title: exp_x_seniority and exp_squared interaction features
candidates.result: Shipped; contributed the jump to 0.326 before Kaggle blend.

candidates.title: Bayesian smoothing on company target encoder
candidates.source: MODEL_ISSUES follow-up flag after Kaggle blend
candidates.acceptance: R2 must beat the hard MIN_ENCODER_SAMPLES=3 cutoff (0.413).
candidates.result: Rejected: smoothing lost at every strength (best 0.399 < 0.413). High company_enc importance is genuine signal. Do not retry.

candidates.title: Drop Adzuna salary_is_predicted=1 rows to reduce quantization noise
candidates.result: Not viable: validation scrape returned salary_is_predicted=0 for all rows; the predicted flag is not the quantization source.
